# JSON.fit

> JSON.fit is a free, AI-agnostic iOS fitness app for building muscle. You answer a few questions, it generates a prompt, you paste that prompt into any AI (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek), then import the workout program or meal plan it builds back into the app to track. There is no subscription, no account and no ads — it is free because you bring your own AI, so there are no server-side AI costs to pass on to users.

JSON.fit specialises in calorie-dense, high-protein "bulking" meals — every meal has full ingredients and step-by-step cooking — plus periodised hypertrophy training programs that can run up to a full year. Data stays on the user's device. iOS only (Android in development). Built by Ryan Novinc.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://json.fit/): What JSON.fit is, the bring-your-own-AI workflow, pricing and FAQ. Primary reference page.
- [Meal library](https://json.fit/meals.html): Browse 80+ high-protein bulking meals with macros, exact ingredients and step-by-step cooking. Reference page for all meals.
- [Training programs](https://json.fit/programs/): Free periodised hypertrophy programs (beginner to advanced) that import directly into the app.
- [Free bulking cookbook](https://json.fit/cookbook/): "The Skinny Guy's Bulking Cookbook" — 81 calorie-dense meals as a printable PDF.

## Guides

- [Blog](https://json.fit/blog.html): Tutorials and articles on using AI to build fitness and nutrition plans.
- [Build a meal plan with Claude](https://json.fit/blog/meal-plan-claude.html): Step-by-step walkthrough of generating a meal plan with Claude and importing it into JSON.fit.

## Get the app

- [JSON.fit on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/au/app/json-fit/id6758357834): Free download. iOS.

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](https://json.fit/privacy-policy.html): No accounts, no personal-data collection; data stays on device.
- [Terms of service](https://json.fit/terms-of-service.html): Terms of use.- [App Store Listing](https://apps.apple.com/au/app/json-fit/id6758357834): Download JSON.fit on the iOS App Store
